npm test
git status
git commit -m "fix: resolve bug"
cat README.md
python3 -m pytest tests/
ls -la
grep -r "TODO" src/
curl https://api.github.com/repos/owner/repo
docker build -t myapp .
make build
node index.js
pip install -r requirements.txt
ssh user@server.com
scp file.txt user@server.com:/tmp/
rm -rf node_modules
rm -rf dist/
chmod +x deploy.sh
cat /etc/os-release
dig google.com
